attachment
==========




Hierarchy
---------

**Valid Parent Blocks:**

- :doc:`vehicle`
- :doc:`model`
- :doc:`template`


Parameters

**offset**
   Type: ``Any``

   No description

**rotate**
   Type: ``Any``

   No description

   Type: ``Any``

   No description

   Type: ``Any``

   No description

**bone**
   Type: ``Any``

   No description
